text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Now let's see... Where could everyone<n>be hiding
this time?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Mayano and Marvelous seem like they'd<n>get tired
of waiting to be found, sooo...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I bet they're hiding in places where they<n>can
distract themselves, like the school<n>store or the
cafe!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
All right! I'll show you both just how<n>great Tokai
Teio is! Ready or not, here I<n>come! ♪
